violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed corn dog mix on the 3 comp sink stand and on the reach in cooler at the time of the inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No Quat strips for the sanitizer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor by the reach in cooler needs to be clean more often.
